sentences.en: Put your pajamas in the laundry basket.
sentences.zh: 把睡衣放進洗衣籃。
sentences.ipa: /pʊt jʊɚ pəˈdʒɑməz ɪn ðə ˈlɔndri ˈbæskɪt/

sentences.en: You can have dessert after dinner.
sentences.zh: 晚餐後可以吃甜點。
sentences.ipa: /ju kæn hæv dɪˈzɝt ˈæftɚ ˈdɪnɚ/

sentences.en: Lights out in five minutes, okay?
sentences.zh: 五分鐘後要關燈囉，好嗎？
sentences.ipa: /laɪts aʊt ɪn faɪv ˈmɪnɪts oˈke/

sentences.en: Let's take a picture together here.
sentences.zh: 我們在這裡一起拍張照吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets tek ə ˈpɪktʃɚ təˈɡeðɚ hɪr/

sentences.en: Time to leave the playground now.
sentences.zh: 現在該離開遊樂場了。
sentences.ipa: /taɪm tu liv ðə ˈpleɡraʊnd naʊ/

sentences.en: Are you excited for the school trip?
sentences.zh: 你期待學校的校外教學嗎？
sentences.ipa: /ɑr ju ɪkˈsaɪtɪd fɔr ðə skul trɪp/

sentences.en: Take your time, there's no rush.
sentences.zh: 慢慢來，不用趕。
sentences.ipa: /tek jʊɚ taɪm ðerz no rʌʃ/

sentences.en: You can take turns with the toy car.
sentences.zh: 你們可以輪流玩玩具車。
sentences.ipa: /ju kæn tek tɝnz wɪð ðə tɔɪ kɑr/

sentences.en: Let's use our words instead of hitting.
sentences.zh: 我們用說的，不要動手。
sentences.ipa: /lets juz ˈaʊɚ wɝdz ɪnˈsted ʌv ˈhɪtɪŋ/

sentences.en: You can't watch TV until your room is clean.
sentences.zh: 房間整理好之前不能看電視。
sentences.ipa: /ju kænt wɑtʃ ˌtiˈvi ənˈtɪl jʊɚ rum ɪz klin/

sentences.en: That was very brave of you.
sentences.zh: 你剛剛真的很勇敢。
sentences.ipa: /ðæt wʌz ˈveri brev ʌv ju/

sentences.en: Never talk to strangers alone.
sentences.zh: 絕對不要獨自跟陌生人說話。
sentences.ipa: /ˈnevɚ tɔk tu ˈstrendʒɚz əˈlon/

sentences.en: Drink plenty of water when you're sick.
sentences.zh: 生病的時候要多喝水。
sentences.ipa: /drɪŋk ˈplenti ʌv ˈwɔtɚ wen jʊɚ sɪk/

sentences.en: Let's call Grandpa and wish him happy birthday.
sentences.zh: 我們打給爺爺祝他生日快樂吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets kɔl ˈɡrænpɑ ənd wɪʃ hɪm ˈhæpi ˈbɝθde/

sentences.en: Did you have fun at your friend's house?
sentences.zh: 你在朋友家玩得開心嗎？
sentences.ipa: /dɪd ju hæv fʌn æt jʊɚ frendz haʊs/

sentences.en: Use your inside voice, please.
sentences.zh: 請用室內音量說話。
sentences.ipa: /juz jʊɚ ˈɪnsaɪd vɔɪs pliz/

sentences.en: Let's put on sunscreen before we go out.
sentences.zh: 出門前先擦防曬乳吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets pʊt ɑn ˈsʌnskrin bɪˈfɔr wi ɡo aʊt/

sentences.en: Let's do something outside instead of watching videos.
sentences.zh: 我們去外面做點事，不要看影片了。
sentences.ipa: /lets du ˈsʌmθɪŋ ˌaʊtˈsaɪd ɪnˈsted ʌv ˈwɑtʃɪŋ ˈvɪdioz/

sentences.en: Let's sing happy birthday together.
sentences.zh: 我們一起唱生日快樂歌吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets sɪŋ ˈhæpi ˈbɝθde təˈɡeðɚ/

sentences.en: You're getting so good at reading!
sentences.zh: 你的閱讀能力進步好多喔！
sentences.ipa: /jʊɚ ˈɡetɪŋ so ɡʊd æt ˈridɪŋ/
